about.title: Building software for mobility, interaction, and intelligent systems.
about.paragraph_one: I work at the intersection of autonomous mobility, software engineering, and user-centered interaction design. My current focus blends Human Maschine Interfaces for robots,and digital experiences that make complex technology feel clear and useful.
about.paragraph_two: Alongside robotics, I enjoy turning complex industrial and analytical workflows into clean interfaces, whether that means a map-driven routing platform, a ROS-connected HMI, or a dashboard powered by machine learning insights.

card_one.title: Autonomous driving with real-world constraints
card_one.body: Components like Trajectory controller, Decision Makers, HMI workflows, and system integration for model-city and Autonomous shuttle environments.

card_two.title: Software systems with frontend clarity
card_two.body: Python services, data workflows, and web experiences that translate technical complexity into usable products.

card_three.title: Analytics, AI, and human-centered decisions
card_three.body: Data analysis, dashboard thinking, defect prediction, and machine learning systems designed for real people.

learning.title: What defines the way I work and build.
learning.description: I enjoy projects where engineering depth, clear interfaces, and practical impact all come together.

card_one.label: Mobility
card_one.title: Autonomous systems with real constraints
card_one.body: I like working on problems where maps, routing, localization, and system behavior connect directly to the real world.

card_two.label: Interfaces
card_two.title: Experiences people can trust
card_two.body: From shuttle HMIs to booking flows, I care about clarity, accessibility, and confidence in every interaction.

card_three.label: Platforms
card_three.title: Software that supports real products
card_three.body: I build practical Python-based systems, structured data workflows, and web experiences that stay useful and understandable.

card_four.label: Research
card_four.title: Curiosity backed by execution
card_four.body: Research, analytics, and experimentation help me turn ideas into grounded systems with measurable value.

skills.title: Tooling across robotics, web systems, and applied AI.
skills.description: The skill groups below come directly from the areas I use most in coursework, research, and hands-on project delivery.

group_one.title: Backend and APIs
group_one.description: Reliable services, data pipelines, and storage for full-stack systems.

group_two.title: Frontend and interaction
group_two.description: Interfaces that connect users clearly to live backend systems.

group_three.title: Robotics and mobility
group_three.description: Autonomous-driving workflows grounded in sensing, planning, and mapping.

group_four.title: Data and machine learning
group_four.description: Analytics pipelines and ML experiments connected to usable decision support.

projects.title: Selected work across mobility, robotics, and digital systems.
projects.description: A selection of projects spanning route planning, autonomous systems, analytics, and interface design.

experience.title: Project-driven work across autonomous shuttles, route planning, and robotics systems.
experience.description: This timeline reflects the systems I am actively building, from ElDrive shuttle development and ROS-connected HMIs to route planning and autonomous-driving work in Germany.

item_one.title: Student Assistant | Heavy-Transport Route Planning Platform
item_one.point_one: Building a FastAPI and SQLite workflow for transport permit extraction and route constraint storage.
item_one.point_two: Matching permit constraints with national bridge inventory data and converting UTM coordinates to GPS.
item_one.point_three: Developing a Leaflet.js interface with geocoding, avoid-area polygons, and bridge visualization.

item_two.title: ElDrive | Autonomous Shuttle Systems and Scrum Leadership
item_two.point_one: Identified user needs through Human-Centered Design and created story maps plus system architecture using block, state, and activity diagrams.
item_two.point_two: Implemented ROS 2 interfaces and core functionality across localization, path planning, trajectory control, human-machine interfaces, user authorization, and decision-making modules.
item_two.point_three: Served as Scrum Master in a six-member agile team, documented progress in Gitea, and supported the roadmap for code reviews, testing, and deployment in Model City.

item_three.title: ROS-Connected Interfaces for Shuttle Booking and Ride Support
item_three.point_one: Designed external ride-booking and in-shuttle touchscreen interfaces connected live through rosbridge WebSockets.
item_three.point_two: Applied human-centered design with Figma prototypes, user testing, and accessibility-minded interaction flows for elderly users.
item_three.point_three: Added Jest-based validation to improve UI reliability, message handling, and end-to-end interaction clarity.

item_four.title: M.Eng. in Autonomous Driving
item_four.point_one: Coursework includes sensors and actuators, vehicle networking, data processing, AI, and human-machine interfaces.

publication.title: Research credibility alongside applied engineering work.
publication.description: This publication reflects the same applied AI mindset that shows up in my robotics and analytics projects.
publication.summary: Developed a deep-learning approach using ResNet-50 and YOLOv8 to classify and detect road surface defects for safer, more efficient maintenance decisions.

contact.title: Let's build mobility, robotics, and digital products with real impact.
contact.description: If you're hiring for autonomous driving, robotics software, interface design, or product-focused engineering, I'd be glad to connect.

api.title: A live CRUD module that teaches FastAPI step by step.
api.description: Use the form below to create, edit, and delete project entries. The UI sends JSON to FastAPI, FastAPI writes to SQLite, and the refreshed project list comes back into the browser.

method_get.title: Read project data
method_get.body: The browser fetches `/api/projects` and renders the returned JSON into cards.

method_post.title: Create a new project
method_post.body: Submitting the form sends a JSON payload to FastAPI, which inserts a new SQLite row.

method_put.title: Update an existing project
method_put.body: Choosing edit loads a project into the form, then sends a PUT request with the changed values.

method_delete.title: Remove a project
method_delete.body: Delete sends the project id to FastAPI, which removes the row and returns an empty success response.

form.title: Create or edit a project
form.description: This form sends JSON directly to your FastAPI backend.

list.title: Project data returned by the API
list.description: Each card below is rendered from JSON returned by FastAPI.

projects.empty: No featured projects are available yet.

api.empty: No projects are stored yet. Use the form to create one.
api.error: Something went wrong while communicating with the API.

footer.note: Professional portfolio of Karthik Chowdary Nunna, focused on autonomous mobility, robotics, and software systems.
